market goes up 150% it appears to be a little bit overvalued because the stock price outran the earnings growth but if the earnings growth was 100% And the stock only went up 50% you could say that to release the rubber band the stock wants to fling back up to the mean line and it works in Reverse if you pull the stock price up too high and you fling it and let it go down the stock wants to go
